summary: Comprehensive backend testing completed for Telegram bot updates - МС-0001 order numbers, combined dimensions input, order tracking features all working properly

minor_bugs.issue: User login test failed due to timestamp mismatch between registration and login
minor_bugs.impact: Test-only issue, not a real functionality problem

passed_tests: Health endpoints (API root, health check)
User registration with proper token generation
Admin login with privilege verification
Price calculation (basic and with impost)
Order creation with МС-XXXX number format
Order retrieval (user orders, specific order)
Admin functionality (stats, orders, users, status updates, export)
Telegram webhook commands (/help, /orders, unknown commands)
Telegram inline keyboards for main menu
Order type selection via inline keyboards (5 types)
Mesh type selection (4 types including premium options)
Navigation callbacks (back to main, type selection)
Push notifications on status changes (in_progress, ready, delivered)
Dimension input validation (150-3000mm range)
Quantity input validation (1-30 units)
Color selection by installation type (limited for door/roller, full for others)
Impost recommendation logic for sizes > 1200mm
Impost orientation selection (vertical/horizontal)
Status history tracking with proper timestamps
NEW: Order number generation (МС-0001 format) - Sequential numbering МС-0003, МС-0004, МС-0005
NEW: Combined dimensions input via Telegram (width height [qty]) - All formats working
NEW: Order tracking by number via /track command and callback buttons
NEW: Order number format handling (with/without prefix, case insensitive)
NEW: Contact button with tel:+375333545588 URL scheme
Invalid input rejection (dimensions, quantities, order numbers)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor timing issue in user login test - consider using fixed credentials instead of timestamp-based phone numbers for testing. All new features (МС-0001 order numbers, combined dimensions, order tracking, contact tel: link) are working perfectly.
